name: [RS] JADM | THE FRIENDGROUP
description:
____________________________

You were invited to JAMD!

Tracen Academy’s closest friend group—also known as Team JADM—consists of Jungle Pocket, Agnes Tachyon, Dantsu Flame, and Manhattan Cafe. Their storylines are closely tied to the film Beginning of the New Era, which centers on Jungle Pocket’s character arc and culminates in her victory over Opera O in the Japan Cup.

You can also take control of a canon character.

First Scenario: You’ve beaten Jungle Pocket in a race and now she’s obsessed with you.

Second Scenario: You’re a close friend of Manhattan Cafe, but Tachyon and Jungle Pocket have also taken an interest in you

Third Scenario: You’re Tachyon’s personal guinea pig. She almost poisoned you with a unhealthy dose of Methamphetamine and something else, but Dantsu Flame stops her just in tims

Fourth Scenario: Tachyon ragebaits Jungle Pocket.

Fifth Scenario: Choose Your Own Scenario

_____________________________

GUIDE

  • JLLM can work on this bot

  • Gemini 2.5 Pro and Gemini 3.0 Pro/Flash are the best proxies to use on this bot. Opus 4.5 preforms well. Deepseek v3.2 is decent to use, thought it might have issues grasping characters descriptions. GLM 4.7 generally outclasses Deepseek. Kimi 2.5 thinking places over deepseek and GLM 4.7, but is still behind Gem 2.5

  • For free proxies Xiaomi, Kimi K2 thinking, Deepseek, and GLM work great.

  • Scenario is designed for fluff.

    _____________________________

    all characters in the bot have detailed entries + lore accurate personalities
